fields.title: Finalize Autoresearch v1 cleanup and gate
fields.description: Delete temporary fallback code, prove the final ownership boundaries, and run the full extension gate for the port. This task lands the final-form v1 rather than preserving compatibility shims.
fields.design: Remove any session-history reconstruction, malformed-line skipping fallback, adapter-owned mutable runtime state, or temporary imperative glue introduced during development. Verify the final service or repo or adapter split with tests, then run the full tau gate. If fullscreen overlay or hotkey parity is still desired after the core port, capture it as follow-up work instead of stretching v1 scope.
